  have h₁₁ : k.natAbs = 1 := by
    have h₁₂ : (x.val : ℕ) < p := ZMod.val_lt _
    have h₁₃ : (x.val : ℕ) ^ 2 < p ^ 2 := by
      exact Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_left h₁₂ (by norm_num)

      omega
    have h₁₅ : p * k.natAbs ≤ p ^ 2 := by
      linarith
    have h₁₆ : k.natAbs ≤ p := by

    have h₁₇ : k.natAbs ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₁₈
      simp_all
    have h₁₈ : k.natAbs ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h₁₇
    have h₁₉ : p * k.natAbs ≥ p := by
      nlinarith
    have h₂₀ : (x.val : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 ≥ p := by
      linarith
    have h₂₁ : (x.val : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 = p := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_le
      · linarith
      · have h₂₂ : (x.val : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 ≤ p := by

            nlinarith
          omega
        linarith
    linarith
  rw [h₁₁] at h₁₀
  exact h₁₀

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : p ≡ 1 [ZMOD 4] := by
      rw [Nat.ModEq]
      exact h₄
    exact exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₆
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₇ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (x.val : ℕ), 1
    rw [← Nat.cast_inj (R := ℤ)]
    simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one]
    have h₈ : (x : ZMod p) ^ 2 = -1 := hx
    have h₉ : (x.val : ZMod p) = x := by
      simp [ZMod.val_natCast]
    rw [← h₉] at h₈
    have h₁₀ : (x.val : ℤ) ^ 2 + 1 ≡ 0 [ZMOD p] := by
      rw [Int.ModEq]
      simpa [pow_two, Int.add_emod, Int.mul_emod, Int.emod_emod] using
        congr_arg (fun y => (y : ZMod p)) (by ring_nf; simpa using h₈)
    have h₁₁ : (x.val : ℤ) ^ 2 + 1 = p * k := by
      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Int.modEq_zero_iff_dvd.mp h₁₀
      exact hk
    have h₁₂ : 0 < p := Nat.Prime.pos h.out
    have h₁₃ : 0 ≤ x.val := Nat.zero_le _
    have h₁₄ : x.val < p := ZMod.val_lt _
    have h₁₅ : (x.val : ℤ) ^ 2 + 1 ≤ (p - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
      gcongr
      exact_mod_cast h₁₄.le
    have h₁₆ : (p - 1) ^ 2 + 1 < p ^ 2 := by
      cases p with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ p =>
        cases p with
        | zero => contradiction
        | succ p =>
          simp_all [Nat.succ_mul, Nat.pow_succ]
          nlinarith
    have h₁₇ : k = 1 := by
      nlinarith
    rw [h₁₇] at h₁₁
    exact_mod_cast h₁₁
  obtain ⟨a, b, hab⟩ := Set.nonempty_def.mp h₇
  exact ⟨a, b, hab⟩

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    exact exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₄
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₆ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, p)
    simp [Nat.pow_succ]
  sorry

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_sub_cancel, h₄]
      · exact h₅.ne_zero
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₄
  cases' h₃ with x hx
  use (x.val : ℕ)
  use (1 : ℕ)
  have h₇ : (x : ZMod p) ^ 2 + 1 = 0 := by
    rw [hx]
    simp
  have h₈ : (x.val : ZMod p) = x := by
    simp [ZMod.val_nat_cast]
  rw [← h₈] at h₇
  norm_cast at h₇
  omega

have h₁ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have := lemma₁
    simp_all [Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd]
    omega
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have hS : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, 0)
    simp_all
  sorry

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [h₁]
      · omega
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₄
  cases' h₃ with x hx
  use (x.val : ℕ), (1 : ℕ)
  rw [← Nat.cast_one]
  norm_cast
  rw [← sub_eq_zero]
  have h₇ : (x : ZMod p) ^ 2 + 1 = 0 := by
    rw [hx]
    simp
  have h₈ : (x.val : ZMod p) = x := by
    simp [ZMod.val_natCast]
  rw [← h₈] at h₇
  norm_cast at h₇
  omega

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one_iff]
      · omega
      · exact h₁
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_pow_eq_one h₄
  cases' h₃ with x hx
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₄ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, p)
    simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_zero, Nat.zero_add]
    omega
  sorry

have h₁ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have := lemma₁
    simp_all [Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd]
    omega
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ∃ a b : ℕ, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p := by
    apply Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq_of_two_le_of_exists_sq_eq_neg_one
    exact h.out.two_le
    exact_mod_cast hx
  exact h₂

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [h₁]
      · omega
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₄
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₄ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (x.val : ℕ), 1
    rw [← Nat.cast_inj (R := ZMod p)]
    · simp [hx, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one]
    · omega
  obtain ⟨a, b, hab⟩ := Set.nonempty_def.mp h₄
  exact ⟨a, b, hab⟩

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_sub_cancel, h₄]
      · exact Nat.Prime.pos h₅
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h₅ h₄
  cases' h₃ with x hx
  use 0, 0
  sorry

have h₁ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have := lemma₁
    simp_all [Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd]
    <;> omega
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have hS : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, Nat.sqrt p)
    -- This approach is not direct; instead use Zagier's one-sentence proof strategy
  -- Use the involution method from Zagier's proof
  let T := { (x, y, z) : ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | x ^ 2 + 4 * y * z = p }
  have hT : T.Nonempty := by
    use (1, 1, (p - 1) / 4)
    have h₁ : p = 4 * ((p - 1) / 4) + 1 := by
      rw [Nat.div_add_mod p 4]
      omega
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  -- Define the involution
  let f : T → T := fun ⟨x, y, z⟩ =>
    if x < y - z then (x + 2 * z, z, y - x - z)
    else if y - z < x ∧ x < 2 * y then (2 * y - x, y, x - y + z)
    else (x - 2 * y, x - y + z, y)
  -- Show f is an involution with exactly one fixed point
  have h_fix : ∃! t : T, f t = t := by
    use (1, 1, (p - 1) / 4)
    constructor
    · simp [f, Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.succ_le_iff]
      omega
    · intro t ht
      cases' t with x t'
      cases' t' with y z
      simp_all only [Prod.mk.inj_iff, and_imp, exists_prop]
      -- The only fixed point occurs when x = y = z
      -- But given the equation x^2 + 4yz = p and p ≡ 1 mod 4,
      -- the only solution with x = y = z would require 5x^2 = p, impossible for prime p > 5.
      -- Actually, the fixed point condition gives x = y - z and other conditions leading to y = z.
      -- Hence x^2 + 4y^2 = p, so we get the representation.
      have h_eq : x = y := by
        -- From the fixed point conditions
        omega
      have h_eq2 : y = z := by
        omega
      subst_vars
      use x, y
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := h_fix
  cases' t with x t'
  cases' t' with y z
  use x, 2 * y
  have h_eq : x ^ 2 + (2 * y) ^ 2 = p := by
    calc
      x ^ 2 + (2 * y) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 + 4 * y ^ 2 := by ring
      _ = x ^ 2 + 4 * y * z := by rw [ht.1]
      _ = p := by aesop
  exact h_eq

have h₁ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₂ : p ≠ 2 := by
      rintro rfl
      norm_num at hp
    have h₃ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    exact exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one h.out h₃
  cases' h₁ with x hx
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₄ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, p)
    simp [pow_two]
  sorry

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : p % 4 = 1 := hp
    have h₅ : p.Prime := h.out
    have h₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one_iff_ne_zero]
      · norm_num
        omega
      · exact mod_cast h₁
    have h₇ : legendreSym p (-1) = 1 := by
      rw [legendreSym.eq_one_of_sq_eq_one]
      · exact h₆
      · exact mod_cast h₁
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_of_legendreSym_eq_one h₅ h₇
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₄ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (x.val : ℕ), (1 : ℕ)
    rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_val x]
    simp [hx, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one]
    norm_cast
  exact Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mp h₄

have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
  have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
  have h₃ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
    have h₄ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [Nat.Prime.pos h.out]
      · simp [Nat.Prime.pos h.out]
    have h₅ : (p - 1) / 2 % 2 = 0 := by
      omega
    rw [← ZMod.pow_two, ← pow_mul, h₅, pow_mul, one_pow] at h₄
    exact ZMod.exists_sq_eq_of_pow_eq_one h₄
  cases' h₃ with x hx
  let S := { (a, b) : ℕ × ℕ | a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p }
  have h₆ : S.Nonempty := by
    apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
    use (0, p)
    simp [Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out]
  have h₇ : ∃ a b : ℕ, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p := by
    apply Nat.sum_two_squares_of_prime_of_mod_four_eq_one hp h.out
  exact h₇
